fv3_vorticity_cellmean.reference: Harris et al. (2021), GFDL FV3 Technical Memorandum, §3, §5, §6; src/operators/vorticity.jl `fv_vorticity_cellmean` (imperative reference).
fv3_vorticity_cellmean.notes: Cell-mean relative vorticity from D-grid normalized covariant winds via Stokes' theorem on the primal cell. Circulation around the primal cell at (i,j): Γ = v_d[i,j]·dy[i,j] + u_d[i+1,j]·dx[i+1,j] − v_d[i,j+1]·dy[i,j+1] − u_d[i,j]·dx[i,j]. Then ω = Γ / area. The four stencil rows are the four oriented edge contributions; each carries the sign of the outward edge normal in the closed circulation integral. D-grid wind convention (FV3): u_d at UEdge is V·ê_η on a ξ-constant edge of length dx; v_d at VEdge is V·ê_ξ on an η-constant edge of length dy. Per-cell metric bindings (`dx`, `dy`, `area`) are resolved by the cubed_sphere grid accessor at the staggered cell carrying the selector.

metric_bindings.comment: Per-cell metric quantities resolved by the cubed_sphere grid accessor. Names match `CubedSphereGrid` field names so the accessor wires them directly.
metric_bindings.dx: physical length of the ξ-constant edge at UEdge(i,j) (runs in η-direction)
metric_bindings.dy: physical length of the η-constant edge at VEdge(i,j) (runs in ξ-direction)
